---
title: "First Response Plots"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-04-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(jsonlite)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(tidytext)
library(here)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
df<- read.csv(here("..", "..", "data", "processed", "micro_unigram.csv"))
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
## create first response only df
df.first <- df %>% 
  filter(order == 1) 

# clean responses 
df.castro <- df.first %>%
  filter(response_site == "castro") %>%
  count(fieldsite, clean_response) %>%
  group_by(fieldsite) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()
df.mission <- df.first %>%
  filter(response_site == "mission") %>%
  count(fieldsite, clean_response) %>%
  group_by(fieldsite) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()
df.marina <- df.first %>%
  filter(response_site == "marina") %>%
  count(fieldsite, clean_response) %>%
  group_by(fieldsite) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

# micro categories
df.castro.cat <- df.first %>%
  filter(response_site == "castro") %>%
  count(fieldsite, category) %>%
  group_by(fieldsite) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()
df.mission.cat <- df.first %>%
  filter(response_site == "mission") %>%
  count(fieldsite, category) %>%
  group_by(fieldsite) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()
df.marina.cat <- df.first %>%
  filter(response_site == "marina") %>%
  count(fieldsite, category) %>%
  group_by(fieldsite) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

# macro categories here 
```

# Castro-First Responses
## Micro Categories
```{r castro, echo=FALSE, fig.height=8}
# create label column: only show labels for proportions > 4%
df.castro.cat %>%
  group_by(fieldsite) %>%
  arrange(fieldsite, desc(category)) %>%   # control stacking order
  mutate(
    label = ifelse(prop > 0.04, category, ""),
    label_y = cumsum(prop) - prop / 2
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fieldsite, y = prop, fill = category)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
    geom_text(
     aes(y = label_y, label = label),
     color = "white",
      size = 4
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.01),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Castro-First Responses by Fieldsite",
    subtitle = "Only categories greater than 4% receive labels",
    x = "Fieldsite",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "darkred", size = 12),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA)
  )
```

# Mission-First Responses
## Micro Categories
```{r mission, echo=FALSE, fig.height=8}
# Create label column: only show labels for proportions > 4%
df.mission.cat %>%
  group_by(fieldsite) %>%
  arrange(fieldsite, desc(category)) %>%   # control stacking order
  mutate(
    label = ifelse(prop > 0.04, category, ""),
    label_y = cumsum(prop) - prop / 2
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fieldsite, y = prop, fill = category)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
    geom_text(
      aes(y = label_y, label = label),
      color = "white",
      size = 4
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.01),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mission-First Responses",
    subtitle = "Only categories greater than 4% receive labels",
    x = "Fieldsite",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "darkred", size = 12),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA)
  )
```

# Marina-First Responses
## Micro Categories
```{r marina, echo=FALSE, fig.height=8}
df.marina.cat %>%
  group_by(fieldsite) %>%
  arrange(fieldsite, desc(category)) %>%   # control stacking order
  mutate(
    label = ifelse(prop > 0.04, category, ""),
    label_y = cumsum(prop) - prop / 2
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fieldsite, y = prop, fill = category)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
    geom_text(
      aes(y = label_y, label = label),
      color = "white",
      size = 4
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.01),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Marina-First Responses",
    subtitle = "Only categories greater than 4% receive labels",
    x = "Fieldsite",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "darkred", size = 12),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA)
  )
```


# First Individual Responses (All Response Sites)
```{r indiv, echo=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=13}
top_10_indiv <- df.first %>%
  filter(!is.na(response_site), 
         !is.na(clean_response),
         response_site != "") %>%
  group_by(response_site, fieldsite, clean_response) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(response_site, fieldsite) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(count),
         pct = count / total) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = count, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() 

ggplot(top_10_indiv, aes(x = pct, 
             y = reorder_within(clean_response, pct, 
                                interaction(response_site, fieldsite)),
             fill = fieldsite)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 0.1)),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ response_site + fieldsite, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  tidytext::scale_y_reordered() +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 First Responses by Response Site and Fieldsite",
    subtitle = "Percentages show share of all responses in that site × fieldsite combination",
    x = "Percentage of all responses",
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Fieldsite"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "darkred"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

```
